sourceMovie.title: The Lego Ninjago Movie
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Lego Ninjago Movie works as a family movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The family and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Lego Ninjago Movie clicked for you, Big Hero 6 (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Lego Ninjago Movie clicked for you, The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Incredibles 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Lego Ninjago Movie clicked for you, Incredibles 2 (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and adventure, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Lego Ninjago Movie?
faq.answer: Try Big Hero 6, The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part, Incredibles 2—each shares DNA with The Lego Ninjago Movie while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Lego Ninjago Movie?
faq.answer: The Lego Ninjago Movie (2017) is best described as Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Lego Ninjago Movie worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this family lane.
